APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TRIAL PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO 36(A) CCP. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/4/25 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF 8/13/25. PLAINTIFF DEMANDS JURY TRIAL. COURT ORDERS JURY FEES TO BE POSTED BY THE END OF THE DAY. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER.
